nasb.text: He brought into the house of God the dedicated things of his father and his own dedicated things: silver and gold and utensils.

esv.text: And he brought into the house of God the sacred gifts of his father and his own sacred gifts, silver, and gold, and vessels.

cnv.text: 亞撒把他父親所分別為聖，和他自己所分別為聖的金銀和器皿，都送進　神的殿裡。

ccb.text: 他将他父亲和自己奉献给上帝的金银及器皿都带到上帝的殿里。
